## Stack Selection

<!-- Render this section for product-scope briefs (`/spec idea`). Skip for feature/fix briefs.
     Stack selection in v5 is an *output* of the Spec beat, not an input. Evaluate alternatives
     against criteria relevant to the product; don't assert a single option. -->

<!-- Name 4–6 criteria that actually discriminate between alternatives for this product.
     Examples: data-sovereignty requirements, runtime-cost ceiling, team-skill inventory,

     generic checklist — pick what matters here. -->
